channel.title: InYourBones — Bay Area Radar (far_out)
channel.description: Curated upcoming Bay Area shows from InYourBones.

item.title: Marcus King Band @ Fox Theater - Oakland
item.description: 2026-07-08 03:00 — Marcus King Band at Fox Theater - Oakland. Marcus King Band is gaining momentum with a strong live reputation and a unique blend of rock and blues.

item.title: ZAYN @ Chase Center
item.description: 2026-09-03 03:00 — ZAYN at Chase Center. ZAYN's return with The Konnakol Tour is highly anticipated, showcasing his evolution as an artist.

item.title: i-dle @ Oakland Arena
item.description: 2026-08-22 03:00 — i-dle at Oakland Arena. i-dle is making waves in the K-pop scene, promising a vibrant and engaging performance.

item.title: RUSH @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-10-16 02:30 → 2026-10-18 02:30 — RUSH at SAP Center at San Jose.

item.title: Rainbow Kitten Surprise @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-19 03:00 — Rainbow Kitten Surprise at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Rainbow Kitten Surprise has a dedicated following and is celebrated for their energetic and emotional live shows.

item.title: Jack Johnson @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-10-01 01:30 → 2026-10-02 01:30 — Jack Johnson at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Jack Johnson's upcoming tour is sure to attract fans with his laid-back style and strong connection to the audience.

item.title: Three Days Grace @ SAP Center at San Jose
item.description: 2026-11-19 03:00 — Three Days Grace at SAP Center at San Jose. Three Days Grace continues to resonate with fans, making their tour a notable event for rock enthusiasts.

item.title: Tedeschi Trucks Band @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-08-13 01:00 — Tedeschi Trucks Band at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Tedeschi Trucks Band's reputation for exceptional live performances makes this a must-see event.

item.title: Young the Giant @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-20 01:00 — Young the Giant at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley. Young the Giant's collaboration with Cold War Kids promises a dynamic show with two popular bands.

item.title: The Neighbourhood @ Bill Graham Civic Auditorium
item.description: 2026-10-08 02:00 — The Neighbourhood at Bill Graham Civic Auditorium. The Neighbourhood's tour is highly anticipated, showcasing their distinct sound and engaging performances.

item.title: Old 97's @ The Fillmore
item.description: 2026-08-06 03:00 — Old 97's at The Fillmore. Old 97's have a loyal following and are known for their energetic live shows.

item.title: Screeching Weasel @ August Hall
item.description: 2026-09-02 03:00 — Screeching Weasel at August Hall. The Black Crowes and Whiskey Myers together offer a compelling mix of rock and country influences.

item.title: Bob Moses @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-18 02:30 — Bob Moses at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.

item.title: The Fray @ Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley
item.description: 2026-07-24 01:00 — The Fray at Greek Theatre-U.C. Berkeley.
